commits.author: Shashipreetham1
commits.message: done some changes
commits.before: CORS preflight used redundant explicit OPTIONS handler alongside global middleware.
commits.added: Removed duplicate OPTIONS route handler for cross-origin preflight requests.
commits.impact: Prevents middleware conflicts and simplifies cross-origin request handling.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: made the changes in the vitecongif and the versal.json
commits.before: Frontend lacked deployment security headers and routing base configuration.
commits.added: Configured routing base path, added security headers, and API proxy for development.
commits.impact: Enables secure Vercel deployment with client-side routing and backend connectivity.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: made the changes to the vite
commits.before: Vite configuration contained extensive custom build optimizations including path aliases and console stripping.
commits.added: Removed custom Rollup options, path aliases, environment mocks, and build optimizations.
commits.impact: Enables reliable Vercel deployment by eliminating conflicting custom build settings.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: Fix merge conflicts and update configurations
commits.before: Redundant CORS preflight handling existed; .env files were gitignored; Vite dev server blocked browser auto-open.
commits.added: Removed OPTIONS handler from CORS, unignored environment files, and enabled browser auto-open in development server.
commits.impact: Streamlines CORS configuration, permits committing base environment files, and improves developer experience with auto-launching browser.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: made changes to the welcome page
commits.before: Welcome page had wide cards and loose padding with inline CTA text.
commits.added: Reduced card width and padding, wrapped CTA text in dedicated container.
commits.impact: Enables targeted CTA styling and improves visual density on mobile.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: Fix Vercel build configuration for Vite
commits.before: Vercel configuration lacked explicit build command and output directory settings.
commits.added: Specified npm run build command and dist output directory for Vercel.
commits.impact: Enables successful Vercel deployments using correct Vite build artifacts.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: Reorganize and improve .gitignore files for better environment variable handling
commits.before: .gitignore files lacked organization and complete coverage of local environment variable files.
commits.added: Reorganized patterns into labeled sections and added missing .env.*.local ignore rules.
commits.impact: Prevents sensitive credentials from being committed across all development and deployment environments.

commits.author: prachetyerr
commits.message: Merge pull request #15 from prachetyerr/structure1
commits.before: Landing page used wide containers and generous padding; environment files were excluded from git; CORS preflight handled explicitly.
commits.added: Tightened landing page layout and wrapped CTA text; removed environment file gitignore rules; eliminated redundant CORS preflight middleware.
commits.impact: Allows environment file tracking; streamlines server CORS configuration; improves landing page visual density and text styling control.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: Explicitly specify Vite framework in vercel.json to prevent react-scripts detection
commits.before: Vercel auto-detected build framework without explicit Vite configuration present.
commits.added: Configuration now explicitly specifies Vite framework and npm install command.
commits.impact: Prevents incorrect Create React App detection during deployment builds.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: Add explicit Vercel build script and improve deployment configuration
commits.before: Vercel deployments used the standard npm build script shared with local development.
commits.added: Explicit build:vercel script isolates Vercel deployment builds from local development builds.
commits.impact: Enables future build customizations for Vercel without affecting local development or other environments.

commits.author: prachetyerr
commits.message: changed vercel.json file to remove redundancies
commits.before: Frontend deployment config contained overlapping route rules and extra security headers.
commits.added: Removed redundant routes and security headers; added .vercel to gitignore.
commits.impact: Streamlines Vercel deployment and prevents tracking of local build artifacts.

commits.author: prachetyerr
commits.message: committing all other changes related to vercel and gitignore
commits.before: Vercel config lacked framework detection and local environment files were not ignored.
commits.added: Added Vercel framework setting, dedicated build script, and environment file exclusions.
commits.impact: Enables stable Vercel deployments while protecting sensitive environment variables.

commits.author: prachetyerr
commits.message: Merge pull request #16 from prachetyerr/structure1
commits.before: Frontend build process not configured for Vercel platform deployment.
commits.added: Vercel deployment configuration with dedicated build script and framework settings.
commits.impact: Unblocks automated Vercel hosting with proper environment file management.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: Fix CORS configuration to allow www.pyrosynergy.com domain
commits.before: CORS blocked requests from www.pyrosynergy.com subdomain.
commits.added: Support for www.pyrosynergy.com via dynamic origin validation.
commits.impact: Frontend on www subdomain now connects to backend API.

commits.author: Lalithaditya007
commits.message: Merge branch 'structure1' of https://github.com/prachetyerr/land-pyro into structure1
commits.before: Vercel deployment configuration contained redundant routing rules and local deployment files were not ignored.
commits.added: Simplified Vercel config by removing redundant routes and install commands; added .vercel to gitignore.
commits.impact: Enables cleaner builds using framework defaults and prevents local Vercel files from being committed.
